pre_registered.metric: held-out pre-trigger residual MAE and mean bias, evaluated on runs 57 and 65
pre_registered.primary_claim_test: adaptive positivity-constrained pedestal is unbiased if the held-out mean residual CI includes 0 ADC and its MAE is not worse than the simple leave-one-out median by more than 5 ADC
traditional_methods: adaptive positivity-constrained pedestal using the other pre-trigger samples
pre_registered.ml_method: run-split histogram-gradient-boosted regressor predicting the held-out pre-trigger sample, with hyperparameter CV and calibration on runs 56 and 64
